title: Better Smithing Table
description: A better Interface for trimming your Armor.
body:
# Better Smithing Table

This simple datapack allows you to see your armor outside of the Smithing Table before you add a trim to it!

## Crafting:
Craft a "Better Smithing Table" by combining a Smithing Table with an Armor Stand.
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j8Fenh8R/images/5ea7623fa4a97626076dd7ff447a3565c983f02f.png)

## Features
- The armor stand inside of the normal Smithing Table is not displayed inside the Better Smithing Table.
  ![No Armor Stand Inside Better Smithing Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j8Fenh8R/images/0d71dc9473a9154f4d31c26a6880edc82fa835a5.png)
- Armor and Item previews are displayed to scale outside of the Better Smithing Table. 
- Shift clicking items into the Better Smithing Table will auto fill into the correct slot.
- Metal and Diamond tools are displayed on top of the Better Smithing Table.
   ![Diamond Sword Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j8Fenh8R/images/3215ad3eefa03683eb139e4341870ed6720e17cb.png)
- Armor display will face the direction the player placed the Better Smithing Table, allowing for display rooms.
   ![Better Smithing Table Display Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j8Fenh8R/images/8cbf12b7f8a5ba8b9ccf887e3e79ba681a8455d3.png)
